subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen hath testified to thy turning unto God, the Most High, the Most Exalted - a testimony wherewith no treasures can compare [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی باقبالک الی الله العلی الاعلی هذه شهاده لاتعادلها کنوز
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @thankfulness; gratitude
